name: M:GTA.Vehicle.BringToHalt(System.Single,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
summary: Starts the task to decelerate this

params.name: stoppingDistance
params.description: The distance from the initial coords at which the vehicle should come to rest.

params.name: timeToStopFor
params.description: The length of time in seconds to hold the car at rest after stopping.
